entities.name: RigUnit_AddBoneTransform
entities.description: Offset Transform used to perform a change in hierarchy by setting a single bone's transform

properties.name: bone
properties.description: The name of the Bone to set the transform for

properties.name: transform
properties.description: The transform value to set for the given Bone

properties.name: weight
properties.description: The weight of the change - how much the change should be applied

properties.name: post_multiply
properties.description: If set to true the transform will be post multiplied, otherwise pre multiplied

properties.name: propagate_to_children
properties.description: If set to true all of the global transforms of the children of this bone will be recalculated

entities.name: MotionExtractorModifier
entities.description: Extracts motion from a bone in the animation and bakes it into a curve

properties.name: absolute_value
properties.description: Whether to convert the final value to absolute (positive)

properties.name: axis
properties.description: Axis to get the value from

properties.name: bone_name
properties.description: Bone we are going to generate the curve from

properties.name: custom_curve_name
properties.description: Custom name for the curve we are going to generate

properties.name: math_operation
properties.description: Optional math operation to apply on the extracted value

properties.name: modifier
properties.description: Right operand for the math operation selected

properties.name: motion_type
properties.description: Type of motion to extract

properties.name: normalize
properties.description: Whether we want a normalized value (0 - 1)

properties.name: relative_to_bone_name
properties.description: Bone which we'll use as the reference frame to generate this curve from

properties.name: relative_to_first_frame
properties.description: Whether to extract the bone transforms relative to the first frame in the animation

properties.name: remove_curve_on_revert
properties.description: Whether we want to remove the curve when we revert or re-apply modifier

properties.name: sample_rate
properties.description: Rate used to sample the animation

properties.name: space
properties.description: Reference frame/space to use when extracting the bone pose

properties.name: use_custom_curve_name
properties.description: Whether we want to specify a custom name for the curve

properties.description: When true gamepad keys are allowed in the input chord

properties.description: When true modifier keys are allowed in the input chord

properties.name: escape_keys
properties.description: Escape keys

properties.name: key_selection_text
properties.description: Sets the text which is displayed while selecting keys

properties.description: The amount of blank space around the text

properties.name: no_key_specified_text
properties.description: Sets the text to display when no key text is available

properties.name: on_is_selecting_key_changed
properties.description: Called whenever the key selection mode starts or stops

properties.name: on_key_selected
properties.description: Called whenever a new key is selected by the user

properties.name: selected_key
properties.description: The currently selected key chord

properties.name: text_style
properties.description: The button style used at runtime

properties.name: widget_style
properties.description: The button style used at runtime

methods.description: Sets the visibility of the text block

methods.description: Sets the text to display when no key text is available

methods.name: set_key_selection_text
methods.description: Sets the text which is displayed while selecting keys

methods.description: Sets whether or not modifier keys are allowed

methods.name: set_allow_gamepad_keys
methods.description: Sets whether or not gamepad keys are allowed
